allow: Bash(curl -sS -L --compressed --max-time 40 -A "Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36 \(KHTML, like Gecko\) Chrome/124.0 Safari/537.36" 'https://wikiwiki.jp/chunithmwiki/%E6%B7%B7%E6%B2%8C%E3%82%92%E8%B6%8A%E3%81%88%E3%81%97%E6%88%91%E3%82%89%E3%81%8C%E7%A5%9E%E8%81%96%E3%81%AA%E3%82%8B%E8%AA%BF%E5%BE%8B%E4%B8%BB%E3%82%92%E8%AD%98%E3%81%88%E3%82%88' -o /tmp/konton.html)

Bash(curl -sS -L --compressed --ssl-no-revoke --max-time 40 -A "Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36 \(KHTML, like Gecko\) Chrome/124.0 Safari/537.36" -H "Accept-Language: ja" 'https://wikiwiki.jp/chunithmwiki/%E6%B7%B7%E6%B2%8C%E3%82%92%E8%B6%8A%E3%81%88%E3%81%97%E6%88%91%E3%82%89%E3%81%8C%E7%A5%9E%E8%81%96%E3%81%AA%E3%82%8B%E8%AA%BF%E5%BE%8B%E4%B8%BB%E3%82%92%E8%AD%98%E3%81%88%E3%82%88' -o /tmp/konton.html)
